query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM establishments WHERE 
address LIKE '%Eugenio%' OR address LIKE '%Americo%' OR address LIKE '%Olimpio%' 
OR address LIKE '%Jeronimo%' OR address LIKE '%Candido%' OR address LIKE '%Alvaro%' 
OR address LIKE '%Otavio%' OR address LIKE '%Lucio%' OR address LIKE '%Decio%' 
OR address LIKE '%Tulio%' OR address LIKE '%Angelica%' OR address LIKE '%Consolacao%'
OR address LIKE '%Paraiso%' OR address LIKE '%Inacio%' OR (address LIKE '% Joao %' AND address NOT LIKE '% João %')
OR address LIKE '%Mauricio%' OR address LIKE '%Fabricio%' OR address LIKE '%Rogerio%'
OR address LIKE '%Sergio%' OR address LIKE '%Virgilio%' OR address LIKE '%Emilio%'
OR address LIKE '%Claudio%' OR address LIKE '%Vinicius%' OR address LIKE '%Cicero%'
OR address LIKE '%Conceicao%' OR address LIKE '%Goncalves%' OR address LIKE '%Sebastiao%'
OR address LIKE '%Chacara%' OR (address LIKE '%Mario%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Mário%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM establishments WHERE 
address LIKE '%Eugenio%' OR address LIKE '%Americo%' OR address LIKE '%Olimpio%' 
OR address LIKE '%Jeronimo%' OR address LIKE '%Candido%' OR address LIKE '%Alvaro%'

OR address LIKE '%Paraiso%' OR address LIKE '%Inacio%' OR (address LIKE '% Joao %' AND address NOT LIKE '% João %')
OR address LIKE '%Mauricio%' OR address LIKE '%Fabricio%' OR address LIKE '%Rogerio%'
OR address LIKE '%Sergio%' OR address LIKE '%Virgilio%' OR address LIKE '%Emilio%'
OR address LIKE '%Claudio%' OR address LIKE '%Vinicius%' OR address LIKE '%Cicero%'
OR address LIKE '%Conceicao%' OR address LIKE '%Goncalves%' OR address LIKE '%Sebastiao%'
OR address LIKE '%Chacara%' OR (address LIKE '%Mario%' AND address NOT LIKE '%Mário%');
